[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 1100110 4
2 1011111 6
3 0110110 4
4 1001101 4
5 0011111 5
6 0011011 4
7 1111110 6

01 10 0111001 4
12 21 0111000 3
23 32 0111000 3
34 43 1111001 5
45 54 1111011 6
56 65 0111011 5
67 76 1110111 6
70 07 1110111 6

13 31 0111000 3
24 42 1101001 4
35 53 0111010 4
46 64 1110001 4
57 75 1111110 6 match 7
60 06 0110001 3
71 17 1111110 6 match 7

25 52 0111010 4
36 63 0111001 4
47 74 1110111 6
50 05 0111011 5
61 16 0011001 3
72 27 1111110 6 match 7

37 73 1111110 6 match 7
